title: Discord User
description: A user in Discord represents a person or bot account with a unique identity, username, avatar, and various account properties.

username.description: The user's username, not unique across the platform

discriminator.description: The user's Discord tag (legacy, 0 for migrated users)

bot.description: Whether the user belongs to an OAuth2 application

system.description: Whether the user is an official Discord System user

mfa_enabled.description: Whether the user has two factor enabled

accent_color.description: The user's banner color as an integer

verified.description: Whether the email on this account has been verified

flags.description: The flags on a user's account

public_flags.description: The public flags on a user's account

avatar_decoration_data.description: Data for the user's avatar decoration
